Container.Name: FTPSync
Container.Overview: FTP Remote-to-Local Sync v1.1.2. Monitors a remote FTP server and downloads new or changed files to your Unraid shares automatically. Tracks every downloaded file by SHA256 fingerprint so nothing is ever downloaded twice. Features a full web-based FTP Browser with upload, download, rename, delete, folder downloads, and multi-server profile support. Incomplete or cancelled downloads are automatically cleaned up — no partial files left behind. Manage everything from the web UI at the address shown below.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the FTP Sync web interface.

Config.Name: Download Folder
Config.Description: Where synced and browser-downloaded files are saved on your Unraid server.

Config.Name: Config and History Storage
Config.Description: Stores settings, download history database, server profiles, and saved sessions.

Config.Name: Config File Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where settings are saved. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: History Database Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where the download history database is stored.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that downloaded files will be owned by. Use 99 for nobody (Unraid default).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that downloaded files will be owned by. Use 100 for users (Unraid default).

Config.Name: Verbose Logging
Config.Description: Set to true to enable detailed debug logging. Only needed for troubleshooting.

Config.Name: Disable Auto Browser Open
Config.Description: Set to 1 to prevent the container from trying to open a browser on startup (recommended for headless Unraid).
